text.title: Quality-Attribute Trade-off Analysis Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Scenarios loaded across perf, cost, security, availability. Conflicts: perf-vs-cost (cache size), security-vs-availability (MFA on every login), cost-vs-availability (multi-AZ). Sensitivity points: cache config, MFA policy, replication mode. Resolution rules quantified. Risks: MFA-fatigue on shopper flow; non-risks: maintainability vs perf aligned. Report published.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
